description: Fix Raijin overlay position, Amaterasu honor update, Sol tiebreak bonus in Kami phase, and add honor track animation
steps: 1. Move Raijin 'Coloca un Bushi' overlay from fixed position at top to inside map-container (below TemplePanel)
2. Fix Amaterasu reward to update player.honor values after reordering honorTrack
3. Remove applySolTiebreakBonus calls from resolveKamiTurn and resolveCurrentKamiReward
4. Add CSS animation to HonorTrack for when a player moves to top position
acceptance_criteria: Raijin overlay renders inside map-container area, not at top of screen
Amaterasu correctly updates player.honor for all players after reordering
Sol tiebreak bonus does NOT fire during Kami resolution phase
Honor track shows animation when a player moves to top
verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0
